compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: inline duct fans, shutter exhaust fans
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature, humidity, VPD triggers; schedule, cycle, timer; data logging
compatible_devices.notes: Two independent AC outlets up to 1100W combined. Device must auto-start when power is applied. Inline fans and shutter exhaust fans explicitly listed. EU users need NEMA-to-Schuko plug adapter; 100-240V universal voltage.

compatible_devices.compatible_series: CLOUDLINE S, CLOUDLINE T, CLOUDLINE Pro
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CLOUDLINE S6, CLOUDLINE T6, CLOUDLINE Pro T6
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature, humidity, VPD triggers; schedule, cycle, timer
compatible_devices.notes: On/off only via standard AC outlet; EC speed modulation not available. For full variable speed control, a UIS controller (e.g. Controller AI+) is required instead. Fan must be connected via its AC power cord, not UIS port.

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature, humidity, VPD triggers; schedule, cycle, timer
compatible_devices.notes: Clip-on oscillating fans explicitly listed as compatible. On/off only; no speed adjustment. Device must auto-start when powered.

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: seedling heat mats, terrarium heaters, fermentation warmers
compatible_devices.notes: Seedling heat mats, terrarium warmers, and fermentation heating devices explicitly listed. On/off controlled by temperature trigger. Device must auto-start when powered; no thermostat override allowed.
